creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 169414
v1 (drop bin/fpcalc)

Trying to build multimedia/ffmpeg with CHROMAPRINT=on (see bug 208457) using poudriere leads to

  ====>> Error: Dependency loop detected:
  These packages depend on each other: ffmpeg-3.0.1,1 chromaprint-1.3.1

In order to fix bin/fpcalc have to be dropped or moved into a separate port.
